  ├────────────────────┼─────┼────────┤
  │ [38;5;153mKeepInfoCollection[39m [38;5;153m│[39m [38;5;153m7[39m   [38;5;153m│[39m [38;5;153mKeep[39m   [38;5;153m│[39m
  [38;5;153m│[39m [38;5;153m.java[39m              │     │ 정보   │
  └────────────────────┴─────┴────────┘

  ---

[38;5;246m●[39m Reading [1m1[0m file… [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m
[38;5;246m [39m [38;5;246m⎿[39m  [38;5;246m…oid/tools/r8/shaking/Enqueuer.java[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mclean architecture, single         [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  responsibility principle,          [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  interface-oriented programming     [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난    [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  부분을 개선하자.                   [39m[49m

[38;5;215m✶[39m [38;5;215mMeandering…[39m [38;5;246m(7m[39m [38;5;246m36s[39m [38;5;246m·[39m [38;5;246m↑[39m [38;5;246m3.7k[39m [38;5;246mtokens)[39m

[2m[38;5;244m─────────────────────────────────────────
[0m[38;5;246m❯ [7m[39m [0m
[2m[38;5;244m─────────────────────────────────────────
[0m  [38;5;246mesc[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246minterrupt[39m
